message:
fix(db): default fsqlite_concurrent_mode to false (opt-in)

BEGIN CONCURRENT (MVCC page-level writes) is now opt-in rather than
opt-out. The default was flipped because concurrent mode can cause
subtle issues in single-connection setups that most deployments use.
Set FSQLITE_CONCURRENT_MODE=true to re-enable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
